data.title: What Sparked The Cannabis Stock Rally On Thursday?
data.description: Cannabis stocks blazed higher on Thursday after Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) reportedly said cannabis reform is "on the horizon."

data.title: Red-Hot Copper: ETFs Soar On Tariff Speculation, Supply Squeeze
data.description: Copper ETFs hit record highs as U.S. considers imposing tariffs on imports. Prices spike, inflows surge and miners benefit. Global supply concerns.

data.title: $100 Invested In Boston Scientific 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Elon Musk Says Tesla Doesn't Need Lidar Because 'People Don't Shoot Lasers Out Of Their Eyes' After YouTubers Put His Cars Through Wylie E. Coyote Tests
data.description: Despite Elon Musk's public dismissal of LiDAR as unnecessary for self-driving, Tesla quietly became the top customer of LiDAR supplier Luminar in 2024—just as China surged ahead in global LiDAR dominance.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Worth Over $12 Billion Set To Expire On Friday: Market Volatility Looming Large?
data.description: The cryptocurrency market could experience a major upheaval as investors brace for the expiry of over $12 billion worth of Bitcoin options on Friday, March 27.
